notes: Two-leg AUDCAD/GBPAUD FX cointegration basket from the 2026-07-06 extended screen. The row is card-worthy, not a formal strict survivor: both half-sample ADF tests pass and OOS net Sharpe is 1.16, but half-life is 81.2 days versus the original 60-day filter.

The scan hedge used for mechanization is negative (-0.4667), so the EA trades the second leg with sign(-beta) direction: long spread means long AUDCAD and long GBPAUD, short spread means short both legs.
USDCAD.DWX and AUDUSD.DWX are declared for conversion/history warmup under a USD tester account; only AUDCAD.DWX and GBPAUD.DWX are traded.
